name: Do Not Render the Helmet
description:
隐藏所有玩家（包括自己）头盔栏中任何物品的模型，不改变装备与属性。默认禁用头盔栏物品渲染，可在按键绑定中设置快捷键切换。

Hides any item equipped in every player's head slot, including your own, without changing equipment or attributes. Head-slot rendering is disabled by default; assign its key binding to toggle it in game.
